name: Ningbo Jintian Copper(Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Jintian Copper(Group) Co., Ltd. processes copper in China. The company offers copper wires and bars, copper cathodes, enameled copper wires, and magnetic materials, as well as copper alloy stripes, sheets, and alloy pipes under the Zhejiang brand name; and copper tubes, stripes, stick, sheets, and plates. It also provides high precision wires, valves, electrolytic copper, and water meters. In addition, the company involves in the high-tech materials, non-ferrous metal trading, and other businesses. It was formerly known as Ningbo Jintian Copper (Group) Company and changed its name to Ningbo Jintian Copper(Group) Co., Ltd. in December, 2000. Ningbo Jintian Copper (Group) Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Ningbo, China.
